---
title: "NBA Arenas Map"
author: "Kyle W."
date: "3/27/2026"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Install required packages if needed (run once)
if (!requireNamespace("leaflet", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("leaflet")
if (!requireNamespace("dplyr", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("dplyr")
if (!requireNamespace("rmarkdown", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("rmarkdown")
library(leaflet)
library(dplyr)

# Creation date (explicitly printed on page for rubric)
creation_date <- Sys.Date()
```

## OVERVIEW
This page shows a small NBA‑focused interactive map built with leaflet. The dataset is created inside this document so it is fully reproducible.
Creation date: r creation_date

## NBA SAMPLE DATASET
```{r data, echo=TRUE}
# Small reproducible NBA dataset (team, arena, lat, lon, short description)
nba_arenas <- tibble::tribble(
  ~team, ~arena, ~lat, ~lon, ~popup,
  "Los Angeles Lakers", "Crypto.com Arena", 34.0430175, -118.2672541, "Los Angeles Lakers — Crypto.com Arena",
  "Golden State Warriors", "Chase Center", 37.7680, -122.3877, "Golden State Warriors — Chase Center",
  "Boston Celtics", "TD Garden", 42.3662, -71.0621, "Boston Celtics — TD Garden",
  "Chicago Bulls", "United Center", 41.8807, -87.6742, "Chicago Bulls — United Center",
  "Miami Heat", "Kaseya Center", 25.7814, -80.1870, "Miami Heat — Kaseya Center"
)

# Show the dataset
nba_arenas
```

## INTERACTIVE LEAFLET MAP
```{r map, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Basic leaflet map with markers and popups
leaflet(data = nba_arenas) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  setView(lng = -95.7129, lat = 37.0902, zoom = 3) %>%
  addMarkers(
    ~lon, ~lat,
    popup = ~paste0("<b>", team, "</b><br/>", arena, "<br/>", popup),
    label = ~team,
    options = leaflet::markerOptions(riseOnHover = TRUE)
  )
```

## DOWNLOADABLE CSV
```{r writecsv, echo=TRUE}
# Write a local CSV copy (renders when knitting locally)
write.csv(nba_arenas, "nba_arenas_sample.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
